extraction.one_line_summary: SKALMOLD Matias attacked solo inside 1km on final climb to Villars after EVENEPOEL's move at 6.5km fractured field, taking stage and yellow
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL attacked at 6.5km on Villars climb immediately after Knox pacing ended, forcing race leader Küng to crack.
GALL Felix countered Evenepoel but was caught by Ayuso group, revealing Movistar's lack of teammate support uphill.
SKALMOLD launched final attack inside 1km when Gall was caught by chasers, exploiting hesitation in Ayuso's group.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: took yellow by attacking when team pacing ended at 6.5km, though caught before summit
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: negative: lost yellow jersey when Evenepoel attacked, unable to follow initial acceleration despite starting as race leader
rider_signals.SKALMOLD Matias: positive: followed Evenepoel's 6.5km move then soloed to victory inside 1km, gaining 12 seconds on Ayuso
rider_signals.GALL Felix: neutral: strong enough to initially follow Evenepoel but isolated when caught by chasers, still seeking first pro win
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: bridged to Evenepoel group after initial gap opened, best of the chasers at 12 seconds
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: dropped early when Knox paced for Evenepoel on 10km climb, unexpected weakness
